title: Enforce EC2 IMDSv2
console_steps: 5. Set hop limit to 1 (or 2 for containers)
cli_example: aws ec2 modify-instance-metadata-options --instance-id i-0123456789abcdef0 --http-tokens required --http-endpoint enabled

references.title: Ensure EC2 instance metadata service version 2 is enabled

rollback_difficulty: Easy — can revert to IMDSv1 optional
